_note: Icon adapter (@agent-ui/icons) + Phosphor default pack + ui-icon. Trace: ADR-0065 (architecture) + ADR-0066 (Phosphor pack) + icon-adapter.lld.md (LLD-C1..C6). Build-slice IDs = the node ids (s-*). Default topology parallel; edges are real import/data dependencies only. PREP = s-pkg-prep + s-tripwire; INTEGRATION = s-barrel.

nodes.label: @agent-ui/icons package skeleton (package.json exports + devDep + tsconfig wiring + dirs)
nodes.accept: `npm install` picks up the workspace; `npm run check` resolves `@agent-ui/icons` and `@agent-ui/icons/phosphor` subpaths (exports map + tsconfig include reach packages/agent-ui/icons); no runtime dep beyond the `@phosphor-icons/core` devDependency

nodes.label: types.ts — ICON_NAMES as-const union (IconName) + IconPack shape
nodes.accept: `tsc` green; a unit test asserts `ICON_NAMES.length === 9` and each is a distinct string; `IconPack` compiles as `{id,viewBox,icons:Record<IconName,string>}` (erasableSyntaxOnly — no enum)

nodes.label: registry.ts — Registry class + iconRegistry singleton (registerPack/setActivePack/activePack/overrideIcon)
nodes.accept: registry unit test green: first registerPack becomes active; duplicate id last-wins + console.warn; setActivePack(unknown) throws; overrideIcon(name,body) layers over the active pack without mutating the pack object

nodes.label: resolve.ts — resolveIcon(name)->SVGElement + setIcon(el,name) (currentColor, 100%x100%, aria-hidden, non-throwing missing)
nodes.accept: unit test green: for a registered name resolveIcon returns an SVG-namespace element with fill='currentColor', width/height='100%', aria-hidden='true', and a non-empty child; unknown name / no active pack returns `<svg data-icon-missing='name'>` and does NOT throw; setIcon replaces el's children with the resolved svg

nodes.label: scripts/vendor-phosphor.mjs — build-time curation of the 9 Phosphor regular SVGs -> committed inert TS
nodes.accept: `node packages/agent-ui/icons/scripts/vendor-phosphor.mjs` reads @phosphor-icons/core, writes ONLY src/phosphor/icons.gen.ts; a second run with the unchanged name-map + pinned version produces a byte-identical file (determinism)

nodes.label: phosphor/icons.gen.ts — GENERATED, committed inert bodies keyed by IconName
nodes.justify: generated-artifact — the committed codegen output of s-vendor-script; a reviewable data file with no behavior of its own
nodes.accept: a data-completeness unit test asserts every one of the 9 ICON_NAMES maps to a distinct, non-empty SVG body string

nodes.label: phosphor/index.ts — phosphorPack + self-register/activate on subpath import
nodes.accept: importing `@agent-ui/icons/phosphor` registers + activates the pack; `resolveIcon('eye-slash')` then returns a non-empty svg; a grep invariant confirms NO module under packages/agent-ui/icons/src/** imports any `@phosphor-icons/*` package

nodes.label: src/index.ts — the @agent-ui/icons root barrel (types+registry+resolve; NOT phosphor)
nodes.accept: `import { resolveIcon, setIcon, iconRegistry, ICON_NAMES } from '@agent-ui/icons'` resolves; a bundle/shape proof confirms the root barrel drags zero Phosphor bytes (phosphor reachable only via the subpath)

nodes.label: layering.test.ts:57 — widen the allowlist to admit @agent-ui/icons as a 2nd lower-tier sibling
nodes.accept: `npm test` layering.test.ts stays green with controls/icon/* importing `@agent-ui/icons`; the negative control (a components file importing a NON-allowlisted package) still FAILS the trip-wire

nodes.label: controls/icon/ — UIIconElement (ui-icon) + icon.css; self-defines + joins the family barrel
nodes.accept: browser test: `<ui-icon name='caret-down'>` renders an svg child; changing `name` re-resolves; `label` non-empty sets role=img + aria-label; the host is a 1em cell with color:inherit (currentColor)

nodes.label: @agent-ui/icons unit suite (jsdom) — the a-verify-core home + the two cross-package grep negative controls
nodes.accept: `npm test` runs the icons suite green (types/registry/resolve/phosphor asserts above); TWO grep gates present and each BITES: (1) NO module under packages/agent-ui/icons/src/** imports `@phosphor-icons/*`; (2) NO module under packages/agent-ui/icons/src/** imports `@agent-ui/components` (the icons ↛ components invariant that ADR-0065's whole rejected-alternatives case rests on)

nodes.label: ui-icon browser suite (Chromium+WebKit) — the cell-fit probe proving the geometry contract
nodes.accept: `npm run test:browser` green on both engines; the cell probe injects resolveIcon('caret-down') into a real [data-role=caret] cell and asserts the rendered svg box MEASURES the font-rhythm px (== the computed `--ui-select-glyph`/`--ui-button-glyph` value, NOT the icon-cell px) AND into a real [data-role=icon] cell asserting it measures the icon px (== `--ui-*-icon`) — both with NO edit to button.css/select.css

actions.label: define the canonical, pack-agnostic icon name vocabulary
define the inert, swappable pack shape (id/viewBox/bodies)
register / activate / override packs (the public two-tier registry)
resolve an icon name to a fresh <svg> element (non-throwing on miss)
inject a resolved icon into an element imperatively (setIcon)
make icon content fit the existing icon/caret cells with NO css-law change (currentColor + 100% stamping)
vendor a curated Phosphor subset at build time into committed inert TS
provide + self-register the Phosphor default pack
consume an icon declaratively (<ui-icon>, reacts to name/label; live pack-swap reactivity deferred)
expose the adapter as a zero-runtime-dep leaf package with correct exports
expose the adapter API on the root barrel WITHOUT dragging the default pack
permit the components -> icons cross-package edge (trip-wire)
verify the adapter core behavior (registry + resolve + pack) by test
verify the two cross-package invariants (no runtime @phosphor-icons/* AND no @agent-ui/components import under icons/src) via grep negative controls
verify the consumer surface + the cell-fit geometry contract by browser test

edges.why: types.ts lives inside the package skeleton — the workspace + tsconfig must exist before any module type-checks
registry.ts is compiled under the package's tsconfig created by the prep slice
resolve.ts is compiled under the package's tsconfig created by the prep slice
the vendor script needs the @phosphor-icons/core devDependency installed by the prep slice's package.json
registry types its packs against IconPack/IconName
resolveIcon/setIcon take an IconName parameter
resolveIcon reads iconRegistry.activePack() + the override map
phosphorPack is a typed IconPack over IconName
the pack's self-register side effect calls iconRegistry.registerPack
icons.gen.ts is the generated OUTPUT of the vendor script
phosphor/index.ts imports phosphorIcons from the generated icons.gen.ts
the root barrel re-exports ICON_NAMES/IconName/IconPack
the root barrel re-exports Registry/iconRegistry
the root barrel re-exports resolveIcon/setIcon
ui-icon imports setIcon/resolveIcon from the @agent-ui/icons root barrel
ui-icon's cross-package import of @agent-ui/icons fails the layering gate until the allowlist admits it — the widen must land first (or with) ui-icon
the core unit suite asserts the registry ops directly (register/activate/override/last-wins/unknown-active-throws) — not only transitively via resolve
the core unit suite exercises resolveIcon/setIcon
the suite asserts Phosphor self-registration + the two cross-package grep invariants
the browser suite + cell-fit probe render the ui-icon element and the resolved svg in real cells
